name: Cherry Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 large package instant vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, margarine, sugar, and chopped nuts in a bowl. Blend until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Press the dough into the bottom of a 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for approximately 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool completely.
4. In a food processor or with a hand mixer, cream together the cream cheese, powdered sugar, and Cool Whip until smooth.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled crust.
6. In another bowl, combine the milk and instant pudding mix. Beat until thickened.
7. Add the pudding to the cream cheese mixture and stir gently.
8. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
9. Spread the pie cherries over the chilled mixture.
10. Sprinkle the remaining Cool Whip and chopped nuts on top.
11. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
